name: NATS Streaming
description: NATS Streaming — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Messaging.

seo.title: NATS Streaming Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete NATS Streaming analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: NATS Streaming is a Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure tool.
pros: Managed pub/sub infrastructure removes server ops burden
review.best_for: Apps with live features: chat, collaboration, gaming
review.not_for: Purely request-response apps with no real-time needs

lock_in.reason: Open source messaging, deprecated for JetStream

developer_experience.reason: Docs exist but superseded by NATS JetStream
